description_long: This is a rectangular, carton-style bottle with a predominantly white exterior and gold accents. The front displays the brand 'FARAGELLO GOLD' in gold lettering, along with an image of a guava fruit and the text 'Premium Guava Nectar from Guava Pulp.' The sides feature nutritional information, a barcode, and additional branding, while the back includes more detailed product information and another guava image. The top of the carton is folded, typical of juice or nectar packaging, and there is no visible spout or cap, suggesting a sealed, tear-open design. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, with printed text and graphics. The overall shape is tall and rectangular, designed for easy handling and storage.
description: A tall, rectangular white and gold carton bottle labeled 'FARAGELLO GOLD' with guava imagery and smooth, glossy surfaces. It features detailed branding and nutritional information on all sides.
description_view_0: Side view showing a vertical gold stripe, barcode, FSC logo, and part of the folded top.
description_view_1: Front view with 'FARAGELLO GOLD' branding, guava fruit image, and product description in gold text.
description_view_2: Side view with large vertical 'FARAGELLO' text and 'Premium Guava Nectar' at the bottom.
description_view_3: Back view with detailed product information, nutritional facts, and a small guava image at the bottom.
attribute_label_or_branding: The bottle features 'FARAGELLO GOLD' in large gold letters on the front, with 'Premium Guava Nectar from Guava Pulp' below. There is a guava fruit image, a barcode, FSC logo, and detailed nutritional and product information in black and gold text on the sides and back.
